title: Sziqiqi Vintage Antique Metal Pillar Candle Holders Set of 2, Distressed Hurricane Candlestick Candle Holders Prefer Centerpieces for Christmas Table Mantle Fireplace Decoration, Deer
features: CHRISTAMS DECORATION: This pillar candle holder have 4 styles to choose in our store, include Christmas tree shape, heart shape, deer shape and star shape, it is a perfect decoration for Christmas theme.

DISTRESSED DESIGN: The base of candle holder done in a beautiful antique white color with a distressed finish all around for an aged appearance. They combine the perfect style of modern and vintage that adds a shabby look.
REMOVABLE GLASS HURRICANE: The antique chic candle holders comes with a removable glass hurricane. The open end glass can be individualy used as a glass hurricane candleholder to decorate your table.

APPLICATION: Our unique candle holder will be a nice centerpieces decorations for Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, New Year, wedding, parties, dinner, holiday decoration or other special events, adds festival atmosphere.
ABOUT SIZE: Set of 2. Height - 8cm/3.2in; Base Wide - 12cm/4.7in; Each holder can hold one standard sized pillar or tealight candles. (candles are not included)
